concerns.text: FR-004 rule 4 references an ‘absolute relative difference between the reported sample size (per variant) and the reconstructed sample size’, but the specification never defines a way to reconstruct sample sizes; sample sizes are only reported, not recomputed. This makes the rule circular and unable to flag genuine sample‑size inconsistencies.

The Scope Justification paragraph states that the retained functional requirements are … (list ending with FR‑028) and explicitly says “All other previously added requirements were removed”. Yet the Requirements section later includes FR‑030 and FR‑031, which contradicts the earlier claim that they were removed. The document is internally inconsistent about whether FR‑030/031 belong to the scope.
The Edge Cases section refers to ‘FR‑07’ (missing the leading zero) while the correct identifier throughout the document is ‘FR-007’. This typo creates a mismatched reference.
